home.tagline: Where creative projects from the Cerberus Team community are shared 🔥

submit.title: 🚀 Submit Project
submit.subtitle: Share your project with the Cerberus Team community via Pull Request — no database needed!

fork.title: 1. Fork & Clone
fork.desc: Fork this repository and clone it to your machine, then install dependencies.

folder.title: 2. Create your app folder
folder.desc: Create a new folder inside src/apps/ with your app's unique slug name.

meta.title: 3. Add meta.ts
meta.desc: Create meta.ts with your project info. This is the only required file.

app.title: 4. Add index.tsx (optional)
app.desc: If you want an embedded mini-app the hub can launch, create index.tsx with a default export.

pr.title: 5. Open a Pull Request
pr.desc: Push your branch and open a PR. We'll review and merge it — your app appears automatically!

submit.successMessage: Your project is pending review. Thank you for your contribution!
submit.errorMessage: Could not submit project. Please try again.

validation.descMin: Description must be at least 10 characters

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Rankings based on project completeness and contributor activity
leaderboard.projectsDesc: Scored by: embedded app (+3), demo (+2), source (+2), thumbnail (+1), description quality (+2)
leaderboard.contributorsDesc: Ranked by total number of projects submitted
leaderboard.empty: No projects yet — be the first!
